title: Timesheet - Input hours
excerpt: In our projects, we don’t need to control minutes and seconds. How can I configure “Time” field in order to register just full hours?

posts.author: nascimento (Adriano)
posts.cookedHtml: In our projects, we don’t need to control minutes and seconds. How can I configure “Time” field in order to register just full hours?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nascimento

Welcome to the monday.com community! There is an ‘Hour’ column you can use and may find helpful for this instance. Let me know if you get stuck, feel free to drop me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io I’d be happy to help where I can.

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream
